caption:
An insulation installer we work with couldn't keep up with grant season.

When the grants land the phone melts — but most callers are window-shopping or don't qualify, and each one's a 15-minute chat he doesn't have time for. The ready-to-go customers slipped through. So we set up a system that qualifies every enquiry up front: checks the eligibility basics, books the real ones, filters the rest.

Now he fits insulation all day instead of answering the same questions on repeat.

Grant season burying you? Free audit — link in bio. 👇

#insulation #retrofit #renewables #tradesbusiness #ukandireland
